mission.title: kubearmor: feat(controller): Move deployments to KubeArmorController
mission.description:
**Purpose of PR?**:
Fixes #1249 

**Does this PR introduce a breaking change?**
Not a breaking change but since deployments are being updated, updates would've to be carried accordingly.

**If the changes in this PR are manually verified, list down the scenarios covered:**:
* helm installation

**Additional information for reviewer?** :
* Deprecate KubearmorPolicy, KubearmorHostPolicy, KubearmorAnnotation controllers and use the single KubeArmorController instead.
* Update helm charts

**Checklist:**
- [ ] Bug fix. Fixes #<issue number>
- [x] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] This change requires a documentation update
- [x] PR Title follows the convention of  `<type>(<scope>): <subject>`
- [ ] Commit has unit tests
- [ ] Commit has integration tests

resolution.summary: NOTE: The [ci-test-ginkgo workflows](https://github.com/kubearmor/KubeArmor/blob/main/.github/workflows/ci-test-ginkgo.yml) are expected to fail rn  as we don't have a kubearmor-controller image with the latest tag published to dockerhub yet. Use helm chart tests which build the image first for validating this PR
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
helm repo add kubearmor https://delusionaloptimist.github.io/charts/
helm upgrade --install kubearmor kubearmor/kubearmor --set kubearmorrelay.enabled=true -n kube-system
